title: Add ability to attach SharePoint folders to work item
excerpt:
I would like to be able to attach a SharePoint folder in the Files column type, rather than just individual files, as we often have multiple files associated with a project task. 
Thanks for considering!

posts.author: m.mackenzie (Megan MacKenzie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to attach a SharePoint folder in the Files column type, rather than just individual files, as we often have multiple files associated with a project task.

Thanks for considering!

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @m.mackenzie

Our Microsoft 365 Office Embedded app allows you to display linked SharePoint folders in an item view and fully interact with the SharePoint folders from within monday.com.

It does much more than just that though, including automations and several different views for boards, items, dashboards & workdocs. Take a look at the getting started guide to find out more.
